title: Flowchart of Python Conditional Logic
description: A visual guide showing the decision-making process using `if`, `elif`, and `else` statements in Python, demonstrating how a program evaluates conditions to choose a path of execution.
relationships: Flow proceeds from Start to the first 'if' condition for evaluation
If 'if' is True, flow goes to its Code Block, then to End
If 'if' is False, flow proceeds to the next 'elif' condition
If any 'elif' is True, flow goes to its Code Block, then to End
If all 'if' and 'elif' conditions are False, flow goes to the 'else' Code Block, then to End
